mapper.sql: SELECT i.inventory_id, i.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit, i.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, i.location_id, l.warehouse_code as location_code, l.warehouse_name as location_name, a.warehouse_name as area_name, i.batch_no, i.production_date, i.expiry_date, i.qty, i.lock_qty, i.version, i.del_flag, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.remark FROM wms_inventory i LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON i.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse l ON i.location_id = l.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse a ON l.parent_id = a.warehouse_id
mapper.select: WHERE i.material_id = #{materialId} AND i.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND i.location_id = #{locationId} AND i.batch_no = #{batchNo} AND i.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_inventory (material_id, warehouse_id, location_id, batch_no, production_date, expiry_date, qty, lock_qty, version, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{warehouseId}, #{locationId}, #{batchNo}, #{productionDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{qty}, #{lockQty}, 0, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_inventory SET del_flag = '2' WHERE inventory_id IN #{inventoryId}
